title: Doctor Who: The Day of the Doctor
posterAlt: Doctor Who: The Day of the Doctor (2013) movie poster
tmdbOverview: In 2013, something terrible is awakening in London's National Gallery; in 1562, a murderous plot is afoot in Elizabethan England; and somewhere in space an ancient battle reaches its devastating conclusion. All of reality is at stake as the Doctor's own dangerous past comes back to haunt him.
synopsis: Doctor Who: The Day of the Doctor is a 2013 science fiction and adventure film from United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 9.3 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
